items.title: Stock markets are too high and set to fall, says Bank of England deputy
items.summary: It is unusual for a senior figure at the Bank to be so forthright on market movements.

items.title: Europe Mulls What Mutual Defense Looks Like Outside NATO
items.summary: European Union nations have a little-known obligation to protect one another. Experts caution it is no replacement for NATO.
